emails.subject: HS Energy Services
emails.body: HS Energy Services This counterparty came across on my online list for today. I took a look at the master you have in your office, and to me it seems to be approved for all products, including weather pulp paper, just not FX. In Susan Flynn's email she said no pulp paper. Which is correct?

emails.subject: Re: HS Energy Services
emails.body: Re: HS Energy Services Tana: Sara worked on this but I agree with you. Carol St. Clair EB 3892 713-853-3989 (Phone) 713-646-3393 (Fax) carol.st.clair@enron.com Tana Jones 07/11/2000 01:25 PM
